calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar May-24-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order is Off calendar at the request of moving party. EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And Award For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
